'''masoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pocketer|pocketer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pocketer|pocketer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| masoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæseteth|mæseteth]] || [[word:mæsetej|mæsetej]] || [[word:mæsetesh|mæsetesh]] || [[word:mæsete|mæsete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:masosototh|masosototh]] || [[word:masosotoj|masosotoj]] || [[word:masosotosh|masosotosh]] || [[word:masosoto|masosoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:masototh|masototh]] || [[word:masotoj|masotoj]] || [[word:masotosh|masotosh]] || [[word:masoto|masoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:masoftoth|masoftoth]] || [[word:masoftoj|masoftoj]] || [[word:masoftosh|masoftosh]] || [[word:masoftof|masoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:masototho|masototho]] || [[word:masotojo|masotojo]] || [[word:masotosho|masotosho]] || [[word:masotoko|masotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:masototh|masototh]] || [[word:masotoj|masotoj]] || [[word:masotosh|masotosh]] || [[word:masoto|masoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:masotothol|masotothol]] || [[word:masotojol|masotojol]] || [[word:masotoshol|masotoshol]] || [[word:masotokol|masotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:masotothotho|masotothotho]] || [[word:masotojojo|masotojojo]] || [[word:masotoshosho|masotoshosho]] || [[word:masotoko|masotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:masotothon|masotothon]] || [[word:masotojon|masotojon]] || [[word:masotoshon|masotoshon]] || [[word:masotokon|masotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:masotothoro|masotothoro]] || [[word:masotojoro|masotojoro]] || [[word:masotoshoro|masotoshoro]] || [[word:masotokoro|masotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
